highlightCards.title: Information Asymmetry
highlightCards.desc: Syndicate intermediaries consistently suppress farmgate prices and inflate retail prices. Agri-VoiceLink's GNN engine detects and exposes these price manipulation networks in real time.

highlightCards.title: Digital Inclusion by Design
highlightCards.desc: Voice input in native Bangla dialects and OCR for handwritten text ensure that non-literate and low-literacy farmers are not left behind by the digital transition.

highlightCards.title: Transparent Digital Marketplace
highlightCards.desc: Beyond price data, Agri-VoiceLink creates a competing transparent network — a structural intervention that directly undermines syndicate market power.

objectives.title: Technical Development & Model Validation
objectives.subtitle: Hybrid AI Architecture
objectives.desc: Build and validate the hybrid LLM-GNN architecture integrating specialized Bangla ASR and OCR modules capable of analyzing and disseminating agricultural market dynamics at scale.

objectives.title: Farmer Empowerment & Access
objectives.subtitle: Frictionless Voice Channel
objectives.desc: Conduct a structured pilot program onboarding 5,000 farmers across two distinct agricultural districts, ensuring an intuitive, frictionless experience for non-digital-native users.

objectives.title: Market Impact & Economic Metrics
objectives.subtitle: Socio-Economic Contribution
objectives.desc: Quantitatively demonstrate platform impact through measurable increases in gross farmer income and verifiable reduction in post-harvest losses by project completion.

techDetails.title: Large Language Model (LLM)
techDetails.desc: A fine-tuned open-source LLM serves as the conversational front-end, processing natural-language queries in spoken or written Bangla and translating them into structured data requests for the analytical engine.

techDetails.title: Graph Neural Network (GNN)
techDetails.desc: The analytical core models the supply chain as a complex graph — farmers, markets, commodities, and buyers as nodes; transactions and goods flow as edges. Detects syndicate sub-graphs and price manipulation patterns invisible to traditional methods.

techDetails.title: Bangla ASR Pipeline
techDetails.desc: Built on a fine-tuned Whisper-based model trained on a custom corpus of agricultural vocabulary and local dialects, achieving >95% speech-to-text accuracy across a diverse farmer demographic.

techDetails.title: Bangla OCR Pipeline
techDetails.desc: A modified ResNet-34 architecture handles handwritten Bangla market board images through binarization, character segmentation, and classification — achieving >97% accuracy on handwritten characters and numerics.

timelineQuarters.title: Foundation & Data Acquisition
timelineQuarters.desc: Literature review of Bangla OCR/ASR and GNNs. Field interviews with farmers. Collection of historical market price data and annotated voice/handwritten datasets for model fine-tuning.

timelineQuarters.title: Hybrid Model & Prototype Development
timelineQuarters.desc: Core LLM-GNN architecture development. Training and fine-tuning of Bangla ASR and OCR modules. Integration and internal testing of functional alpha prototype.

timelineQuarters.title: Pilot Deployment & Optimization
timelineQuarters.desc: Onboard and train 5,000 farmers in two districts. Deploy beta platform. Collect user feedback, transactional data, and analyze market syndicate patterns in real-world conditions.

timelineQuarters.title: Impact Assessment & Commercialization
timelineQuarters.desc: Final quantitative and qualitative analysis of pilot data. Develop scalable commercialization strategy. Establish formal partnerships for post-grant sustainability and nationwide scale.

sdgs.title: No Poverty
sdgs.desc: Enhances farmer incomes and reduces economic vulnerability in rural areas by eliminating price exploitation by intermediaries.

sdgs.title: Zero Hunger
sdgs.desc: Reduces post-harvest losses and stabilizes market prices through efficient, AI-driven supply chain management.

sdgs.title: Decent Work & Growth
sdgs.desc: Promotes fair trade practices, curbs market manipulation, and fosters equitable income distribution for smallholder farmers.

sdgs.title: Innovation & Infrastructure
sdgs.desc: Demonstrates the transformative power of AI and digital infrastructure in modernizing agriculture and driving rural development.

aboutUs.introduction: Bangladesh's agricultural sector — valued at USD 47.54 billion — is critically hampered by information asymmetry. Over 85% of farmers depend on intermediaries who capture up to 40% of retail prices, leaving farmers earning 20–30% below market value. Post-harvest losses range from 23.6% to 43.5%, often a direct consequence of poor market access and lack of timely information. Agri-VoiceLink addresses this through a multimodal conversational interface accepting spoken Bangla and images of handwritten market boards — making real-time price discovery and supply-chain intelligence accessible to every farmer, regardless of literacy level.
aboutUs.vision: Empowering every farmer in Bangladesh with state-of-the-art, voice-activated AI interfaces in their local dialects, enabling real-time, expert-level disease diagnostics and sustainable agricultural insights.
aboutUs.mission: To systematically collect rural speech corpora, train high-accuracy bilingual speech models, and design lightweight multi-modal networks capable of rendering critical agronomic help entirely offline at the field edge.

coreValues.title: Linguistic Equity
coreValues.desc: Ensuring no farmer is left behind or misunderstood because of their regional vocabulary, vernacular syntax, or colloquial accent.

coreValues.title: Empirical Excellence
coreValues.desc: Validating every model prediction, advisory prompt, and disease diagnosis against rigorous regional agronomic field trials.

coreValues.title: Offline Accessibility
coreValues.desc: Designing edge-native architectures that render critical, voice-first agricultural help without requiring premium high-bandwidth active internet pipelines.
